query: The product search on our sandbox isn't returning newly added products. I think the search index is stale and needs a rebuild. How do I trigger that?
I have a local folder with metadata XML and site preferences that I need to push to our dev instance. How do I import it and wait for it to finish?
The nightly product export job keeps failing on our sandbox and I can't figure out why from Business Manager. Is there a way to run it and see the detailed logs?

I just updated a bunch of product descriptions via a data feed and now I need to make sure the search index picks them up before our QA team tests tomorrow morning. How do I kick off a reindex and confirm it completed?

I need to export our entire site configuration — preferences, payment methods, shipping config — as a site archive that I can then import into a different sandbox. What's the process to trigger that export and download the result?

We have a scheduled import that runs at 2am but it seems to be stuck in a running state for over 3 hours. I need to check what's happening with it — is there a way to see the execution status and logs for currently running processes on the instance?
I need to write a batch processing script that runs nightly to clean up expired promotions. What's the job step pattern?
How do I set up a cron job on our CI server to automatically run our test suite every night?
I need to deploy my updated cartridge code to the sandbox so the new controller changes take effect. What's the push command?
I'm writing a custom chunk-oriented step module in my cartridge — where do I put the read/process/write functions and how does the steptypes.json definition work?
